infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Allow MAULI to access your camera to capture ABHA card photos.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Allow MAULI to use your microphone for voice-to-text chat.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Allow MAULI to access your photos to upload ABHA card images.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Allow MAULI to save ABHA card images to your library.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: Allow MAULI to convert your speech into chat messages.

plugins.microphonePermission: Allow MAULI to use your microphone for voice-to-text chat.
plugins.speechRecognitionPermission: Allow MAULI to convert your speech into chat messages.
